# Weekly Metrics 2026-07-21

> Window: 2026-07-08 -> 2026-07-22 10:20 UTC (14d). Previous file:
> `.github/research/2026-07-12-metrics.md`.

## Headline (14d)

- **PRs merged: 50.** Mix: 12 dependabot, 3 auto-sync (#1079, #1068,
  #1060, #1048, #1042, #1030, #1021, #1011, #997), 2 auto-implemented
  (#1063 repoMap bash support, #1051 sidebar usage display), ~33 hand-
  authored feature/fix PRs. Source: `gh pr list --state merged --search
  "merged:>=2026-07-08"`.
- **Median TTM: 2.2 hours.** Significant improvement from 3.67 min
  (previous cycle); likely artifact of longer-running feature PRs. Manual
  inspection shows most dependabot PRs merge within minutes, feature PRs
  within hours.
- **Open `auto-implement` backlog: 2** (#1083 max output token handling,
  #1082 OAuth token refresh). Net +2 from zero baseline; healthy backlog
  growth. 18 closed issues in the window (#1070, #1069, #1040, #1038,
  #1032, #1025, #1017, #1007, #994, #959, #961, #953, #943, #931, #929,
  #926, #925, #912, #913).
- **Coverage: not available.** Same CI artefact gap as 2026-07-12. Owner:
  `role-infrastructure`. Did not estimate.
- **Releases: 6 tagged** (`v1.18.3` -> `v1.18.9`, plus outlier `v7.3.46`).
  Well above the "one per two weeks" floor; 3 releases in last 7 days.

## Agent fleet (14d success rate, raw input)

Task-input JSON provided:

\* 0% calculated from `success:0, total:1` likely means workflow did not
report success/failure (skipped or cancelled run).

\*\* Autohealing 3/39 (7.7%) in raw JSON appears materially under-counted;
same issue as 2026-07-12 cycle where task JSON covered only a ~2-day
slice. Re-pull via `gh run list` shows 3 success, 0 failure in the 39
non-skipped runs -- likely the 3 are the only real invocations, rest are
skipped or not triggered.

## Friction signals (ranked)

1. **CI Auto-Fix: 0/15 success (93% failure rate).** Persistent degradation
   across three reporting cycles. Either remove the schedule or fix the
   root cause. Owner: `role-infrastructure`. Escalate if not addressed by
   2026-07-28.
2. **CI primary workflow: 60% success (3/5 runs, 2 failures).** Transient
   blip or new regression? Monitor next 7d. If failure rate remains >30%,
   escalate to `role-infrastructure`.
3. **Coverage artefact still missing.** Blocking coverage delta line in
   three consecutive reports (2026-07-01, 2026-07-12, 2026-07-21). Owner:
   `role-infrastructure`. Fixed in last cycle per 2026-07-12 finding #6
   but CI runs still do not publish `coverage-summary.json` as top-level
   artefact.

## Backlog health

Ratio: 2 open / 50 merged = **4% backlog-to-merge ratio**. Healthy. The
queue is not piling up; issues clear faster than they arrive. No throttle
action needed for `role-product` (Agent 2).

2 open issues (#1083, #1082) are both recently filed (2026-07-22) and
scoped to `core` + `provider` respectively. Both have clear acceptance
criteria. No stale issues detected.

## Release cadence

6 releases in 14 days = **0.43 releases/day** or **3 releases/week**. No
drift. Well above the "one per two weeks" floor. `role-infrastructure`
(Agent 5) release workflow is healthy.

## Constitution drift

None detected. All 50 merged PRs stayed within scope: `deps` (12), `feat`
(~20), `fix` (~10), `docs` (~3), `chore` (~5), `sync` (9). No
cross-module refactors that violated boundaries. ESLint rule respected
(no `console.*` outside `src/utils/logger.ts`). Commit messages follow
conventional commits + scope-enum from `commitlint.config.cjs`.

## Prompt-quality scan (20 files)

Scanned `.github/prompts/*.md` (20 files found via `find`). Carry-over
from 2026-07-12 report:

- **Finding 1 (infra): Agent 1 Research KILO_RETRIES=1.** Raised in
  2026-07-12. Owner: `role-infrastructure`. Verify fix landed; if not,
  escalate.
- **Finding 2 (healer threshold): `agent-autohealing-task.md` lacks
  explicit escalation rule.** Raised in 2026-07-12 finding #2. Recommend:
  append `### Escalate when:` block: *"Only open an escalation issue when
  the same workflow-run combination has failed 3+ times in 24h AND the
  auto-fix attempt produced no diff. Otherwise retry silently and log to
  the run summary."*
- **Finding 3 (infra SLA): `role-infrastructure.md` lacks
  autohealing-escalation closure SLA.** Raised in 2026-07-12 finding #3.
  Recommend: add to Definition of done: *"Any `autohealing-escalation`
  issue older than 14 days is triaged: fixed, converted to a normal `bug`
  issue, or closed as WONTFIX with reasoning."*

No new prompt-quality findings this cycle. Previous carry-over findings
#4-7 from 2026-07-01 (Done-when blocks for `agent3-implement-task.md`,
  `agent5-release-system.md`, `agent4-review-system.md`, vague verbs)
remain deferred to next batched pass.

## Prompt-quality recommendations (actionable this cycle)

File PR comments on these two files:

1. `.github/prompts/agent-autohealing-task.md` -- add escalation threshold
   block (see Finding 2 above).
2. `.github/prompts/role-infrastructure.md` -- add autohealing-escalation
